name: Salmon Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon, reserving the liquid.
2. Combine the flaked salmon and reserved liquid with the remaining ingredients except Parmesan cheese.
3. Place the mixture in a buttered 2-quart casserole dish and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-40 minutes.
5. Garnish with parsley before serving.
Makes: 6 servings
